minecraft:emitter_initialization.creation_expression: v.tfjburc.x = 1; v.tfjburc.y = 1; v.tfjburc.z = 1; v.hvxunhk = v.hvxunhk??v.tfjburc; v.olirsmc = 12; v.wllbyik=10; v.gltxtos=0; v.dnqhrnp = 2/32; v.tfjburc.x = 0; v.tfjburc.y = 0; v.tfjburc.z = 0; v.sztwdej = v.sztwdej??v.tfjburc;

sequence.expression: t.rhxwbig=v.dnqhrnp; t.ehcenlr=math.sqrt(2-2*math.cos(180/v.olirsmc))/2; t.lonhuhh=math.sqrt(1-t.ehcenlr*t.ehcenlr); t.ptfylby=180*(math.mod(v.gltxtos, v.olirsmc)+0.5)/(v.olirsmc)+90; t.vvcltaz=t.lonhuhh*math.cos(t.ptfylby); t.ogkcjpi=v.hvxunhk.y*t.lonhuhh*math.sin(t.ptfylby)+v.sztwdej.y; t.cihteif=math.cos(t.ptfylby+90); t.dllqnig=v.hvxunhk.y*math.sin(t.ptfylby+90); t.ptfylby=360*math.floor(v.gltxtos/v.olirsmc)/v.wllbyik; t.awaptpw=v.hvxunhk.z*t.vvcltaz*math.sin(t.ptfylby)+v.sztwdej.z; t.vvcltaz=v.hvxunhk.x*t.vvcltaz*math.cos(t.ptfylby)+v.sztwdej.x; t.olvbrrc=v.hvxunhk.z*t.cihteif*math.sin(t.ptfylby); t.cihteif=v.hvxunhk.x*t.cihteif*math.cos(t.ptfylby); v.gltxtos=v.gltxtos+1; t.ehcenlr=t.ehcenlr*math.sqrt(t.cihteif*t.cihteif+t.dllqnig*t.dllqnig+t.olvbrrc*t.olvbrrc);

particle_effect.pre_effect_expression: v.hahlhow = t.vvcltaz; v.pegfumj = t.ogkcjpi; v.rgztdom = t.awaptpw; v.ucbteoy=t.cihteif; v.chcvwqs=t.dllqnig; v.pkzkfjf=t.olvbrrc; v.brtepfb=t.ehcenlr; v.mjxejye=t.rhxwbig; v.vmbtigc = 0.01; v.efccfwg = 2/20;
